# Mechanics Pass — Character Creation (Ch. 1) — 2026-04-26

This document tracks issues identified during the system audit of Chapter 1: Character Creation.

---

## Pass 1 — Creation Consistency & Alignment

### Issue 1 — Attribute Max Reconciliation
**Status:** Completed
**Problem:** Ch. 1 states "No attribute can exceed 5." It should reflect the Paragon exception.
**Recommended Fix:** Update to: "The absolute maximum for any attribute is 5 (6 for characters with the Lineage Paragon feature)."

---

### Issue 2 — Human Extra Perk Conflict
**Status:** Completed
**Problem:** Ch. 1 says extra perks at 6, 12, 18. Ch. 2 says 10 and 20. Ch. 3 says 6, 12, 18.
**Recommended Fix:** Standardize all chapters to **Levels 6, 12, and 18** for additional Human perks, as this provides a more consistent progression benefit.

---

### Issue 3 — Vampire Unique Trait Consistency
**Status:** Completed
**Problem:** Ch. 1 uses shorthand "Gain 1 Blood Point when near a dying creature." Ch. 2 has the detailed "Once per round... within 10 feet... Bloodied, drops to 0 HP, or dies."
**Recommended Fix:** Update Ch. 1 to match the precise Ch. 2 language.

---

### Issue 4 — Starting Spells Ambiguity
**Status:** Completed
**Problem:** Ch. 1 does not explicitly tell players how many starting spells they receive.
**Recommended Fix:** Add a note to Step 3: "If you choose a spellcasting class, see your class entry in Chapter 3 to determine how many starting spells you receive (typically 2–3)."

---

### Issue 5 — Success Scale Cross-Reference
**Status:** Completed
**Problem:** Ch. 1 Step 4 describes failure and zero-attribute rolls but does not reference the Meets = Standard success scale.
**Recommended Fix:** Add a brief cross-reference: "For a full breakdown of successes and outcomes, see Chapter 10: Dice System."
